summary: One of the world's oldest nation-states and first global maritime empire, now a smaller EU economy known for tourism, Atlantic ties, and its gateway role between Europe, Africa, and Latin America.

history.detail: Afonso I first king; oldest European nation-state borders (from 1297).
Ceuta captured; start of Portuguese global empire.
Divides world between Portugal and Spain.
Military coup ends 48 years of Salazar/Caetano dictatorship; colonies freed.

tech_startups.vc_ecosystem: Growing; Lisbon a rising European startup hub

resources.oil_gas: None; wind and solar transition leader
resources.agriculture: Cork (50% of world supply), wine, olive oil

follow_the_money.detail: €5B attracted via residency-for-investment; mainly Chinese and Brazilian buyers

connections.detail: Oldest alliance in the world (Treaty of Windsor 1386)
Azores base — Lajes Field; NATO founding member
